item.title: Introducing SWE-Squad: Autonomous AI for Incident Management
item.description: SWE-Squad is an open-source, multi-agent platform that automates the full incident lifecycle — detection, triage, investigation, and resolution — using AI agents. Here's why we built it and how to get started.

item.title: Stability Gates: Preventing Regressions from AI Fixes
item.description: How SWE-Squad's stability gate mechanism validates AI-generated patches before they reach production, ensuring safe autonomous incident resolution.

item.title: Model Routing: Matching AI Models to Tasks
item.description: How SWE-Squad routes different incident management tasks to the optimal AI model, balancing cost and quality across Haiku, Sonnet, and Opus.
